Name: Browsingway
Author: Styr1x, 嗨呀
Punchline: GPU-accelerated browser overlays in-game, with external IPC API.
Description:
Renders browser overlays in-game with GPU-accelerated texture sharing (OnAcceleratedPaint).
Supports external plugin control via Dalamud IPC (HiAuRo integration).
Based on BrowserHost by ackwell.
Changelog:
- GPU-accelerated rendering (OnAcceleratedPaint)
- External IPC API for plugin control
- XIVLauncherCN support
